shape_summary: Three derived views of the standings: division standings (6 tables), league standings (2 lists), and wild-card race (2 lists of 3).

divisionStandings.description: Each value is an array of teams in that division sorted by descending pct. StandingEntry shape matches data-client--rankings-engine contract.

leagueStandings.description: All 15 teams in the league sorted by descending pct.

wildCard.description: Top 3 teams in the league that are NOT the leader of their division, sorted by descending pct.

invariants: divisionStandings has exactly the 6 keys: AL_East, AL_Central, AL_West, NL_East, NL_Central, NL_West.
Each divisionStandings array has exactly 5 entries during the regular season.
leagueStandings.AL and leagueStandings.NL each have exactly 15 entries.
wildCard.AL and wildCard.NL each have exactly 3 entries.
No team appears in wildCard.* if it is the leader (top pct) of its division.
Every array in the returned object is sorted descending by pct.
error_behavior: Pure function; throws TypeError only on malformed input shape.
